title: Foo Bar Postgres Table Partitioning
description: Fix a large unpartitioned Postgres table that is slow for date-range queries. Partition by date and migrate existing data.

tasks.description: Convert app.events to a partitioned table by created_at (monthly or daily) and migrate data.

infrastructure.description: Postgres with app.events table (id, created_at, event_type, payload) with 50k+ rows. Table is unpartitioned and slow for date filters.
